Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6
In this session you will learn how to get FREE LEADS for your workshop or mastermind by implementing social media prospecting tactics and
strategies. You will discover how to find out where your ideal attendee is hanging out online and how to use social media to get free leads for
your mastermind / workshop.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Answer Priming Questions to figure out where your Target Audience is hanging out online:
Think about the immediate value you can offer to leads. This should be something that you can give to them for FREE, right away.
This should be something that doesn’t suck up your time to create or provide -- it should be automated or something that you
create once and can just give to people (set and forget). Most importantly, this is something that will benefit your target audience.
Outline your social media Content Strategy, start implementing it, and stick to it!
Develop a list of Hashtags (keywords) that your Target Audience would be using online
Create messaging / sales scripts for your DM Sales Funnel
Develop a list of LinkedIn + Facebook Groups that your Target Audience would likely be part of
